subtopics.title: Understanding National Values
common_misconceptions: Values are not important for young people
Nigerian values are only about respect
subtopics.teaching_note: Constitutional values (Section 23): discipline, integrity, dignity of labour, social justice, religious tolerance, self-reliance, patriotism. Teaching values through examples: honesty (returning lost money), discipline (obeying school rules), hard work (studying regularly), selflessness (helping others). Nigerian heroes who exemplify values: MKO Abiola (democracy), Chinua Achebe (integrity), Dora Akunyili (anti-counterfeiting), Fela Kuti (speaking truth to power).
